data.body: Sweep landed (commit f71b55c9). Re-reviewed at the post-8d01 HEAD: plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 8 advisory, signed). harness.py:281 BLE0001 typo fixed + BaseException narrowed to Exception so KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit propagate (parent maps signal-death to abstain) — regression tests added (advisory T4/E5). detectors/ had its own allowlist entry — both grounding entries removed (advisory G1G2). _engine_support kept as a legitimate-print read-CLI surface: BLE001 swept, T201 retained (advisory G6 confirms this convention). grounding has no stderr prints to migrate. Code-review subagent: clean (confirmed the narrowing is safe — parent handles signal-death exitcode). 202 grounding tests pass; make lint green.
